generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and duty, I worry about our alliance commitments. Recent reports show that our partners aren't pulling their weight - last year, only 3 of our 12 allies met their defense spending targets. Meanwhile, our own communities face rising costs. How can we maintain security when others won't do their part? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
